headline: Wall Street’s Verdict on Apollo Global After a Flurry of Dealmaking
summary: Wall Street’s verdict on Apollo Global Management (NYSE: APO) after a week of frenzied dealmaking is unmistakably bullish. Analysts have a Moderate Buy consensus with an average price target of $146.71 for the stock, and the high end of the range now stretches well above where shares closed Monday, even after a sharp one-month rebound ...
